reviews.comment:
Exelente atencion
Seguro. Limpio. Impecable. Rico desayuno. Exelente atencion en carga de combustible y servicios. Super recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Safe. Clean. Spotless. Delicious breakfast. Excellent service at the gas station and with all other amenities. Highly recommended.
